input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.2.2
            TITLE: all low voltage batteries must have overcurrent protection that trips at or below the

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.2.2: All Low Voltage batteries must have Overcurrent Protection that trips at or below the
T.9.2.2 All Low Voltage batteries must have Overcurrent Protection that trips at or below the 
maximum specified discharge current of the cells

final_answer: All Low Voltage batteries must have Overcurrent Protection that trips at or below the maximum specified discharge current of the cells
